M365_Control: Ensure the account provisioning activity report is reviewed weekly
Recommendation: Establish regular process of review 'Provisioning activity' report. Reviewing this report on a regular basis allows for identification and remediation of compromised accounts
Expected_Value: Ask the administrator if they have documentation of weekly reviews

M365_Control: Ensure mailbox forwarding rules are reviewed weekly
Recommendation: Establish regular process of review 'Malbox forwarding rules' report . Reviewing this report on a regular basis allows for identification and remediation of compromised accounts
Expected_Value: Ask the administrator if they have documentation of weekly reviews

M365_Control: Ensure users installing Outlook add-ins is not allowed
Expected_Value: 'Other Roles: Mys Custom Apps, My Marketplace App, My ReadWriteMailbox App' is not selected

M365_Control: Ensure that Modern Authentication for Exchange Online is Enabled
Recommendation: Set 'Turn on modern authentication for Outlook 2013 for Windows and later' to 'Enabled (box checked)'

M365_Control: Ensure that user's mailbox delegation (FullAccess) is controlled and not allowed by default
Recommendation: Establish internal process for user's mailbox delegation
Expected_Value:
No allowed mailbox delegation
All mailboxes with 'FullAccess' permissions are reviewed and approved

M365_Control: Ensure external storage providers available in Outlook on the Web are restricted
Recommendation: Disable external storage providers available in Outlook on the Web

M365_Control: Ensure that 'Offline Access' of Outlook mailbox is set to 'Never'
Recommendation: Set 'Offline Access' of Outlook mailbox to 'Never'
Create Conditional access policy that block 'Exchange ActiveSync clients' and set 'Exchange ActiveSync access settings' to 'Block access' or 'Quarantine - let me decide to block or allow later'
Expected_Value:
1. Created Conditional Access Policy and deployed for all users
2. Enabled  'Security Defaults'
3. Disabled

M365_Control: Ensure Outlook is the only application allowed to use on desktop computers and Microsoft Outlook mobile app is the only application allowed to use on mobile devices (unless other app is authorized)
Recommendation: Block all mail applications except od Outlook on desktop computers
Expected_Value:
1. For Intune: App Protection Policy including Outlook exists
2. Azure AD: A Conditional Access Policy for blocking method is included

M365_Control: Ensure mailbox auditing for all users is Enabled
Recommendation: Enable mailbox auditing for all users

M365_Control: Ensure that 'Let your users share their calendars with people outside of your organization who have Office 365 or Exchane' is set to 'Disabled'
Recommendation: Set 'Let your users share their calendars with people outside of your organization who have Office 365 or Exchange' to 'Disabled'

M365_Control: Ensure legacy authentication protocol 'IMAP' is set to 'Disabled'
Expected_Value:
1. Created Conditional Access Policy and deployed for all users
2. Enabled  'Security Defaults'
3. Disabled

M365_Control: Ensure legacy authentication protocol 'POP3' is set to 'Disabled'
Expected_Value:
1. Created Conditional Access Policy and deployed for all users
2. Enabled  'Security Defaults'
3. Disabled

M365_Control: Ensure that 'SendOnBehalfOf' Delegates permissons to user's mailboxes are reviewed and approved
Recommendation: Review and approve SendOnBehalfOf Delegates permissons to user's mailboxes
Expected_Value:
Ask the administrator about the criteria used for the 'SendOnBehalfOf' permissions approval
The SendOnBehalfOf premissions are approved according to the companys criteria and microsoft guideline

M365_Control: Ensure legacy authentication protocol 'Authenticated SMTP' is set to 'Disabled'
Expected_Value:
1. Created Conditional Access Policy and deployed for all users
2. Enabled  'Security Defaults'
3. Disabled

M365_Control: Ensure that 'SendAs' Delegates permissons to user's mailboxes are reviewed and approved
Recommendation: Review and approve SendAs delegates permissons to user's mailboxes
Expected_Value:
Ask the administrator about the criteria used for the 'SendAs' permissions approval
The SendAspremissions are approved according to the companys criteria and microsoft guideline
